task:
OBJECTIVE: Edit /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/api/analyze/route.ts

Fix detectedLanguage to use the actual language from the request instead of hardcoded "ta".

The analyze route receives a language parameter from the transcribe response. Find where detectedLanguage is set to "ta" and replace it with the actual language code from the request body or header.

The fix: read the language from the request body. The client should pass languageCode from the transcribe response. If languageCode is present and not "en-US" or "en", set detectedLanguage to the ISO 639-1 code (e.g. "hi-IN" → "hi", "ta-IN" → "ta", "fr-FR" → "fr").

Add a helper:
function toISO639(code: string): string {
  return code.split("-")[0];
}

Set detectedLanguage from request body:
const languageCode = body.languageCode || "en";
detectedLanguage = toISO639(languageCode);

Remove the hardcoded detectedLanguage = "ta" line.

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/api/analyze/route.ts

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
detectedLanguage derived from request body languageCode
toISO639 helper present
No hardcoded "ta" for detectedLanguage
No TypeScript errors

TEST: cd /Users/srini/Projects/kommit; npx tsc --noEmit

DO NOT: change anything else
DO NOT: use ast.parse
